title: 10 - TitanPRO Plus™ 60'' Round Heavy Duty European Birchwood Folding Table and Universal Table Cart Bundle
features: Streamline your event setup with our bundle featuring 10 TitanPRO Plus™ Heavy Duty European Birchwood Folding Banquet Tables and the TitanPRO™ Universal Table Dolly.
Designed for durability and elegance, this bundle ensures your events run smoothly and impressively.
The TitanPRO Plus™ tables are crafted from 13 layers of high-grade European birchwood, offering unmatched strength and longevity.
Measuring 6' x 30", these tables provide ample space for seating and dining, making them perfect for weddings, banquets, and conferences.

The no-veneer finish highlights the natural beauty of the wood while providing a smooth, easy-to-clean surface with reinforced metal edging and robust folding legs, these tables are built to withstand heavy use and ensure stability during any event.
The TitanPRO™ Universal Table Cart, designed to hold 8 to15 tables, makes transportation and storage effortless.
Built from heavy-duty steel, it ensures reliable performance and longevity.
The cart features swivel caster wheels for smooth maneuverability, even in tight spaces, and an extendable handle adjusts to fit multiple size tables.
This cost-effective bundle provides everything you need for a seamless event setup and takedown.
Invest in the TitanPRO Plus™ Heavy Duty European Birchwood Folding Banquet Tables & TitanPRO™ Universal Table Dolly Bundle for a perfect combination of quality, durability, and practicality.
